subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained the sacred precincts! At all times am I occupied with thy remembrance, and with thy mention am I deeply attached [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فائز بساحت اقدس در جمیع اوقات بیاد تو مشغولم و بذکر تو مالوف آنی فراموش
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
